hero.description: Experience luxury redefined. Discover our exclusive collection of premium vehicles from trusted manufacturers across the Gulf region.

vehicles.description: Explore our curated selection of luxury vehicles, available from multiple trusted manufacturers across Saudi Arabia and Oman.

l4.name: L4
l4.description: Efficient V6 power for every terrain

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Your Trusted Partner in Luxury Automobiles
about.paragraph1: Bahwan Motors has established itself as a premier destination for luxury vehicles in the Gulf region. We specialize in sourcing premium automobiles from authorized manufacturers in Saudi Arabia, Oman, and Kuwait.
about.paragraph2: Our commitment to excellence, transparent dealings, and customer satisfaction has made us the preferred choice for discerning automotive enthusiasts seeking the finest vehicles available in the market.

verifiedQuality.title: Verified Quality
verifiedQuality.description: Every vehicle undergoes rigorous inspection to ensure premium quality.

authorizedDealer.title: Warranty and Support
authorizedDealer.description: provides warranty and support for all vehicles.

expertTeam.title: Expert Team
expertTeam.description: Knowledgeable staff dedicated to finding your perfect vehicle.

fastDelivery.title: Fast Delivery
fastDelivery.description: Streamlined process for quick and hassle-free car delivery.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Ready to find your dream vehicle? Our team is here to assist you with any inquiries about our premium collection.
contact.ctaDescription: Contact us today to schedule a viewing or learn more about our exclusive collection of premium vehicles.

description.saudi: The Lexus LX 600 BB 2026 Saudi Edition combines legendary reliability with refined luxury, featuring premium appointments tailored for the discerning Gulf market.
description.braimi: The Braimi-sourced LX 600 BB 2026 delivers exceptional quality with region-specific enhancements for optimal performance in Gulf conditions.

description.saudi: The ultimate expression of luxury, the LX 600 VIP 2025 Saudi Edition features executive rear seating with massage and climate control.
description.braimi: Braimi Edition VIP 2025 with unparalleled comfort and executive appointments for the distinguished traveler.

description.saudi: The F-Sport 2026 edition delivers dynamic performance with sport-tuned suspension and aggressive styling.
description.braimi: Braimi Edition F-Sport 2026 with enhanced dynamics and sport-focused driving experience.

description.saudi: The GXR L4 2025 Saudi Edition offers robust performance with the efficient 6-cylinder engine, perfect for both urban and off-road adventures.
description.braimi: The Braimi Edition GXR L4 2025 delivers proven reliability with enhanced features for the demanding Gulf terrain.

description.saudi: The flagship GXR L5 2025 Saudi Edition features premium appointments and enhanced capabilities for ultimate versatility.
description.kuwait: Kuwait Edition GXR L5 2026 with exclusive features and premium V8 power for discerning buyers.
